rationale: Review 1 directly targets placement (the rubric) by claiming the file belongs in `TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/`, but its decisive premise — that a project roadmap mandates this path — cannot be confirmed from the shown diff; if that roadmap claim is wrong, acting on it moves the file to the wrong location and makes the PR worse. Review 2's finding (overly broad import) is verifiable from the diff but is entirely off-rubric for placement and does nothing to improve file or declaration organization. Neither review reliably improves placement.
